rules.name: Ignored error return
rules.message: Error return value ignored — handle or explicitly document with _ = func()

rules.name: panic() in library code
rules.message: panic() in library code — return errors instead; panic is for unrecoverable conditions only

rules.name: SQL string concatenation
rules.message: SQL injection risk — use parameterized queries with ? placeholders

rules.name: os/exec with variable input
rules.message: os/exec with variable input may enable command injection — validate inputs

rules.name: Resource close without defer
rules.message: Resource Close() found — verify it's called in a defer statement to prevent leaks

rules.name: Goroutine without context
rules.message: Goroutine without context.Context — use context for cancellation and timeout propagation
